action.reasoning: Observation: Best PESQ is 3.134 (MetricGAN+ baseline). FreqCRN got only 2.34. Need to beat 3.134. Analysis: Complex spectral mapping (predicting real+imaginary residuals) can improve both magnitude and phase, unlike magnitude masking which preserves noisy phase. Zero-initialized residual learning ensures stability. Decision: Write a clean ComplexMappingCRN model with residual learning, train for 50 epochs, then evaluate. If it gets close to 3.134, can try ensemble with MetricGAN+.
